positive: A whimsical, abstract illustration of a stylized celestial garden: intertwining constellations forming crystalline flower petals, deep indigo nebulae blending with soft gold glitter, and glowing mythical hummingbirds flitting among bio-luminescent ferns. The composition should feature clean, bold silhouettes against a cosmic watercolor wash background. Style: modern tattoo flash mixed with Art Nouveau elegance, utilizing stark outlines and vibrant, jewel-toned gradients. Central subject matter is the magical 'Garden of Dreams'. Focus on symmetry and high contrast, with light emanating from the subjects themselves (internal glow). Perfect for screen printing on fabric. Minimalist, clean edges.
negative: ugly, deformed, artifacts, blurry, watermark, text, signature, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, poorly drawn, noisy, gradient noise, logo, brand, trademark
